title: Convert 1D Array Into 2D Array
titleCn: 将一维数组转变成二维数组

testcases.input: original = [1,2,3,4], m = 2, n = 2 Output: [[1,2],[3,4]] Explanation: The constructed 2D array should contain 2 rows and 2 columns. The first group of n=2 elements in original, [1,2], becomes the first row in the constructed 2D array. The second group of n=2 elements in original, [3,4], becomes the second row in the constructed 2D array.
testcases.expectedOutput: [[1,2],[3,4]] Explanation: The constructed 2D array should contain 2 rows and 2 columns. The first group of n=2 elements in original, [1,2], becomes the first row in the constructed 2D array. The second group of n=2 elements in original, [3,4], becomes the second row in the constructed 2D array.

testcases.input: original = [1,2,3], m = 1, n = 3 Output: [[1,2,3]] Explanation: The constructed 2D array should contain 1 row and 3 columns. Put all three elements in original into the first row of the constructed 2D array.
testcases.expectedOutput: [[1,2,3]] Explanation: The constructed 2D array should contain 1 row and 3 columns. Put all three elements in original into the first row of the constructed 2D array.

testcases.input: original = [1,2], m = 1, n = 1 Output: [] Explanation: There are 2 elements in original. It is impossible to fit 2 elements in a 1x1 2D array, so return an empty 2D array.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explanation: There are 2 elements in original. It is impossible to fit 2 elements in a 1x1 2D array, so return an empty 2D array.
